notes: US non-profit standards developer focused on fire, electrical, and life-safety codes. Notable beyond fire: NFPA 1600 is widely cited in business continuity / disaster recovery / emergency-management programs. Codes and standards are paywalled (but viewable for free on nfpa.org via the 'free access' portal — viewing only, no download/redistribute).

match_nodes.description: NFPA 1600 — Continuity, Emergency, and Crisis Management

data.official_name: NFPA 1600 - Standard on Continuity, Emergency, and Crisis Management
data.notes: Paywalled (free read-only viewing on nfpa.org). Widely cited in BCM/DR programs alongside ISO 22301. Provides criteria for an integrated continuity, emergency, and crisis-management program.
